summary: We are seeking a team member with strong hands-on experience building and operating cloud infrastructure and Kubernetes platforms. Our Platforms Practice specializes in mission-critical, intelligent platforms for the world's most ambitious organizations.
skills: Cloud and networking infrastructure best practices

experience.role: Azure Global Live Site Operations Support Delivery Manager
details: Led a team of 12 senior engineers + 20 engineers (~32 total) across India and US
Influenced Azure product roadmap using customer insights and usage trend data analysis
Drove shift from reactive to proactive support model through blameless postmortems and prevention strategies
Managed enterprise communications platform (IM, VoIP, conferencing) at massive scale
Supported multi-platform environments (Windows, Android, iOS, Mac) with secure connectivity (TLS, NAT traversal)
Contributed to Teams migration planning and execution
Executed enterprise server lifecycle management: build, configure, deploy, and decommission
Performed large-scale data migrations and clustering setups for enterprise clients
Applied patches, hotfixes, and service packs across Windows Server environments
Managed Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and Group Policy for enterprise infrastructure
Supported data center engineering tasks and infrastructure operations at scale
